description: Verify :grouped with LEFT JOIN makes child columns nullable
name: left_join_grouped
query_sql:
-- @name GetUsersWithOptionalOrders
-- @returns :grouped
-- @group_by users.id
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id as order_id, o.total
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id;
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), total NUMERIC);
